name: Macaroni and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: (soaked overnight with 1 tablespoon baking soda in 1 quart water - removes the gassy effect)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight.
2. Drain and rinse beans well.
3. Place oil in a large pot and sauté the salt pork until browned.
4. Add all veggies (carrot, onion, celery) and sautee until translucent.
5. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add beans, broth, tomato sauce, and water to the pot.
7. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 hours.
8. When beans are soft, taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
9. Add pasta and simmer until tender.
10. Serve with grated cheese on the side for topping.
